title: Waxable Coral
description: Wax your coral! Stays alive even when it's dry!
body:
Does one thing. Adds. Waxed. Coral. And a method to obtain it. Just right click on any coral block with a honeycomb and you're done! it can be picked up and moved and doesn't dry out when out of water.

Supports [Waxed Icons](https://modrinth.com/mod/waxed-icons)

Built-in Compat:

1.19+ --> Nothing known atm, let me know of any mods you'd like compat with!

1.18.2 --> Upgrade Aquatic
